hero.title: Pick the right agent — and know how to start.
hero.subtitle: We turn 50+ agents into comparable facts — scenarios, risks, getting-started cost, verifiable trust. No ads, no five-star roulette.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Try: support automation, DeFi strategy, IDE copilot…

scenarios.title: Start from the job you have
scenarios.subtitle: Eight real scenarios mapped to candidates we've already vetted.

curated.title: Curated: we ran them so you don't have to
curated.subtitle: Ten agents we actively observe and write full getting-started guides for.

native.title: Platform-native agents
native.subtitle: Agents registered on-chain through AgentLens. Audit reports and attestations are verifiable.
native.empty: No on-chain registrations yet. Data will sync automatically once a node is reachable.

why.title: Why not just ask a chatbot?
why.subtitle: LLMs are great at generating — they don't take responsibility for your pick. AgentLens gives you evidence.

facts.title: Structured facts, not pitches
facts.body: Scenarios, risks, access type, complexity, pricing and official links live as fields, not marketing copy.

evidence.title: Trust evidence is traceable
evidence.body: Tier 0–3 decisions come with reasons. For platform-native agents you can drill down to on-chain attestations and audit reports.

next.title: There's always a next step
next.body: Every detail page tells you who it fits, who it doesn't, and what to actually do next — not just a brochure.

trust.title: Trust infrastructure
trust.subtitle: Platform-native agents default to a verifiable path: on-chain registry, TEE attestation and audit receipts.
